name: @blazes/superstate
description: A minimal actor runtime for TypeScript with mailbox semantics, deferred effects, and inspection.

tasks.ok: deno task lint && deno task fmt:check && deno task check && deno task test
tasks.release: VERSION=$(git cliff --bumped-version) && git cliff -o CHANGELOG.md && deno task fmt && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "chore(*): 🎉 release $VERSION" && git tag $VERSION
